item.title: SCS hosts inaugural foundation-model interpretability symposium
item.author: news@cmu.edu (Hugo Ortega)
item.description: A two-day symposium gathered 200 researchers to compare interpretability techniques across labs.

item.title: Robotics Institute opens new center for warehouse automation
item.author: news@cmu.edu (Paula Wilson)
item.description: The center will host joint projects with logistics companies focused on dense-storage manipulation.
